project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with FastAPI dashboard
test_framework: pytest with tests/ directory (test_imports.py, test_registry.py, test_cli.py)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest tests/ to confirm all tests pass. 2. Check that dashboard app imports work: python -c 'from dashboard.app import app'
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. Use AST/import validation. CDN resources (Bootstrap, Chart.js) are referenced via CDN links in templates.
contribution_requirements: Commit directly to main branch. Keep backward compatibility. Chinese UI text where appropriate.
key_patterns: Dashboard uses FastAPI + Jinja2 templates extending base.html. Bloomberg dark theme with #00ff88 accent. Vanilla JS with fetch() for API calls. Config managed via src/augur/config.py (get_config/set_config/save_config with YAML backend). All 17 agents registered in AgentRegistry. Avatar SVGs at docs/images/avatars/{agent_id}.svg.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - pip package with CLI, MCP, API, config, personas. dashboard/ - FastAPI web app (app.py + templates/ + static/). config/ - agents.yaml model config. tests/ - pytest tests. docs/images/avatars/ - SVG avatars for each agent.
